name: Telegram Plugin
description: Personal Telegram bot relay wired to LocalAgent sessions

botToken.description: Telegram bot token from BotFather. Create one at https://t.me/BotFather

telegramReadingEnabled.description: Enable Telegram polling and message handling

duplicateTelegramChat.description: Duplicate Telegram messages visibly in local chat timeline

ownerChatId.description: Owner Telegram chat id (auto-bound on first private interaction)

mtprotoEnabled.description: Enable direct MTProto transport for individual Telegram messaging

mtprotoMode.description: User session is the direct individual-messaging mode. Bot session keeps MTProto bot auth available too.

phoneNumber.description: Phone number for MTProto user login, for example +15551234567

sessionString.description: Saved MTProto session string used for reconnecting without logging in again

defaultPeer.description: Default @username, phone number, or saved dialog target for MTProto send

proxyType.description: Proxy used by the MTProto connection
